# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds2-edit-program.spec.ts >> DS-2 Edit Program (Didaxis Studio) >> TC-010 - Whitespace-only Program Name is treated as empty
- Location: tests/ds2-edit-program.spec.ts:202:7

# Error details

```
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed

Locator:  getByText('   ', { exact: true })
Expected: 0
Received: 254
Timeout:  5000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for getByText('   ', { exact: true })
    14 × locator resolved to 254 elements
       - unexpected value "254"

```

```yaml
          - paragraph [ref=e572]: Select a program to manage semesters
  - dialog "Edit Program" [ref=e574]:
    - banner [ref=e575]:
      - heading "Edit Program" [level=2] [ref=e576]
      - button [ref=e577] [cursor=pointer]:
        - img [ref=e578]
    - generic [ref=e581]:
      - generic [ref=e582]:
        - generic [ref=e583]: Program Name *
        - textbox "Program Name" [active] [ref=e585]
      - generic [ref=e586]:
        - generic [ref=e587]: Description
        - textbox "Description" [ref=e589]: I.G. whitespace name test
      - separator [ref=e590]
      - button "▸ Show AI Generation Config" [ref=e591] [cursor=pointer]:
        - generic [ref=e593]: ▸ Show AI Generation Config
      - generic [ref=e594]:
        - generic [ref=e595]:
          - generic [ref=e596]: Total Program Hours
          - paragraph [ref=e597]: Required for AI curriculum generation
          - generic [ref=e598]:
            - textbox [ref=e599]:
              - /placeholder: e.g. 900
            - generic [ref=e601]:
              - button [ref=e602] [cursor=pointer]:
                - img [ref=e603]
              - button [ref=e605] [cursor=pointer]:
                - img [ref=e606]
        - generic [ref=e608]:
          - generic [ref=e609]:
            - generic [ref=e610]: Default Session Hours
            - generic [ref=e611]:
              - textbox [ref=e612]: "4"
              - generic [ref=e614]:
                - button [ref=e615] [cursor=pointer]:
                  - img [ref=e616]
                - button [ref=e618] [cursor=pointer]:
                  - img [ref=e619]
          - generic [ref=e621]:
            - generic [ref=e622]: Default Exam Hours
            - generic [ref=e623]:
              - textbox [ref=e624]: "3"
              - generic [ref=e626]:
                - button [ref=e627] [cursor=pointer]:
                  - img [ref=e628]
                - button [ref=e630] [cursor=pointer]:
                  - img [ref=e631]
        - generic [ref=e633]:
          - generic [ref=e634]: Target Audience
          - textbox [ref=e636]:
            - /placeholder: e.g. Career changers, no CS background
        - generic [ref=e637]:
          - generic [ref=e638]: Focus Areas
          - textbox [ref=e640]:
            - /placeholder: e.g. Python, SQL, Machine Learning, Data Visualization
        - generic [ref=e641]:
          - paragraph [ref=e642]: "Sync/Async Ratio: 70% sync / 30% async"
          - generic [ref=e645] [cursor=pointer]:
            - slider [ref=e647]
            - generic: All async
            - generic: 50/50
            - generic: All sync
      - generic [ref=e648]:
        - button "Cancel" [ref=e649] [cursor=pointer]:
          - generic [ref=e651]: Cancel
        - button "Save" [disabled] [ref=e652]:
          - generic [ref=e654]: Save
```

# Test source

```ts
  112 |     await edit.clickSave();
  113 | 
  114 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  115 |     const row = programs.row(newName);
  116 |     await expect(row).toBeVisible();
  117 |     await expect(row).toContainText(afterDescription);
  118 |     await expect(programs.exactText(beforeDescription)).toHaveCount(0);
  119 |     expect(patchCount).toBe(1);
  120 |   });
  121 | 
  122 |   test('TC-006 - Editing only the Description preserves the Name (AC3)', async ({ page }) => {
  123 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  124 |     const programName = `I.G. Desc Only ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  125 |     const beforeDescription = 'I.G. before';
  126 |     const afterDescription = 'I.G. after';
  127 |     await createProgram(page, programName, beforeDescription);
  128 | 
  129 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  130 |     // Leave Program Name untouched on purpose.
  131 |     await edit.fillDescription(afterDescription);
  132 |     await edit.clickSave();
  133 | 
  134 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  135 |     const row = programs.row(programName);
  136 |     await expect(row).toBeVisible();
  137 |     await expect(row).toContainText(afterDescription);
  138 |     await expect(programs.exactText(beforeDescription)).toHaveCount(0);
  139 |   });
  140 | 
  141 |   test('TC-007 - Editing only the Name preserves the Description (AC3 mirror)', async ({ page }) => {
  142 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  143 |     const suffix = uniqueSuffix();
  144 |     const originalName = `I.G. Name Only Source ${suffix}`;
  145 |     const newName = `I.G. Name Only Target ${suffix}`;
  146 |     const description = 'keep me';
  147 |     await createProgram(page, originalName, description);
  148 | 
  149 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, originalName);
  150 |     await edit.fillProgramName(newName);
  151 |     // Description left untouched on purpose.
  152 |     await edit.clickSave();
  153 | 
  154 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  155 |     const row = programs.row(newName);
  156 |     await expect(row).toBeVisible();
  157 |     await expect(row).toContainText(description);
  158 |   });
  159 | 
  160 |   test('TC-008 - Re-opening edit after save shows the new values pre-populated', async ({ page }) => {
  161 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  162 |     const suffix = uniqueSuffix();
  163 |     const originalName = `I.G. Reopen Source ${suffix}`;
  164 |     const newName = `I.G. Reopen Target ${suffix}`;
  165 |     const description = 'I.G. reopen description';
  166 |     await createProgram(page, originalName, description);
  167 | 
  168 |     // First edit: rename.
  169 |     let edit = await openEditModal(page, originalName);
  170 |     await edit.fillProgramName(newName);
  171 |     await edit.clickSave();
  172 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  173 |     await expect(programs.row(newName)).toBeVisible();
  174 | 
  175 |     // Second edit: open again and confirm the persisted values are shown.
  176 |     edit = await openEditModal(page, newName);
  177 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(newName);
  178 |     await expect(edit.descriptionInput).toHaveValue(description);
  179 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).not.toHaveValue(originalName);
  180 |   });
  181 | 
  182 |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  183 |   // Negative flows
  184 |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  185 | 
  186 |   test('TC-009 - Clearing Program Name disables Save', async ({ page }) => {
  187 |     const programName = `I.G. Empty Name ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  188 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. empty name test');
  189 | 
  190 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  191 | 
  192 |     await edit.fillProgramName('');
  193 |     await expect(edit.saveButton).toBeDisabled();
  194 | 
  195 |     // Pressing Enter while empty must not submit.
  196 |     await edit.focusProgramName();
  197 |     await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
  198 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeVisible();
  199 |     await expect(edit.saveButton).toBeDisabled();
  200 |   });
  201 | 
  202 |   test('TC-010 - Whitespace-only Program Name is treated as empty', async ({ page }) => {
  203 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  204 |     const programName = `I.G. Whitespace Name ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  205 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. whitespace name test');
  206 | 
  207 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  208 |     await edit.fillProgramName('   ');
  209 |     await expect(edit.saveButton).toBeDisabled();
  210 | 
  211 |     // A program literally named "   " must never appear in the list.
> 212 |     await expect(programs.exactText('   ')).toHaveCount(0);
      |                                             ^ Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
  213 |   });
  214 | 
  215 |   test('TC-011 - Cancel discards in-progress edits', async ({ page }) => {
  216 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  217 |     const programName = `I.G. Cancel Discard ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  218 |     const originalDescription = 'I.G. cancel description';
  219 |     await createProgram(page, programName, originalDescription);
  220 | 
  221 |     let edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  222 |     await edit.fillProgramName(`I.G. DiscardMe ${uniqueSuffix()}`);
  223 |     await edit.clickCancel();
  224 | 
  225 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  226 |     // Row name in the list must still be the original.
  227 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  228 | 
  229 |     // Re-opening edit shows the previous (saved) values, not the abandoned draft.
  230 |     edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  231 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(programName);
  232 |     await expect(edit.descriptionInput).toHaveValue(originalDescription);
  233 |   });
  234 | 
  235 |   test('TC-012 - Server failure on save (5xx) does not update the list', async ({ page }) => {
  236 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  237 |     const programName = `I.G. Save 500 ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  238 |     const originalDescription = 'I.G. server-failure precondition';
  239 |     await createProgram(page, programName, originalDescription);
  240 | 
  241 |     const attemptedNewName = `I.G. Save 500 Attempt ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  242 | 
  243 |     // Mock only the PATCH /api/programs/:id (the save call). Leave POST
  244 |     // through so the precondition Create above still works.
  245 |     await page.route('**/api/programs/*', async (route) => {
  246 |       if (route.request().method() === 'PATCH') {
  247 |         await route.fulfill({
  248 |           status: 500,
  249 |           contentType: 'application/json',
  250 |           body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Simulated server failure' }),
  251 |         });
  252 |         return;
  253 |       }
  254 |       await route.continue();
  255 |     });
  256 | 
  257 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  258 |     await edit.fillProgramName(attemptedNewName);
  259 |     await edit.clickSave();
  260 | 
  261 |     // Modal stays open with the user's edits intact.
  262 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeVisible();
  263 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(attemptedNewName);
  264 | 
  265 |     // Pre-edit values remain in the underlying list.
  266 |     await expect(programs.exactText(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  267 |     await expect(programs.exactText(attemptedNewName)).toHaveCount(0);
  268 |   });
  269 | 
  270 |   // Requires two concurrent admin sessions to delete then save — out of
  271 |   // scope for a single-page test. Tracked under DS-4 (delete) integration.
  272 |   test.skip('TC-013 - Conflict / 404 when program was deleted by another user', async () => {
  273 |     // Manual or multi-context test: open the program in two browsers,
  274 |     // delete in B, attempt rename in A, expect 404/conflict UX.
  275 |   });
  276 | 
  277 |   // No non-admin credentials are provisioned in .env. Re-enable once
  278 |   // DIDAXIS_VIEWER_EMAIL / DIDAXIS_VIEWER_PASSWORD are available.
  279 |   test.skip('TC-014 - Non-admin user cannot edit programs (if role-gated)', async () => {
  280 |     // Requires a viewer-role login (e.g. qa-viewer@school.edu).
  281 |   });
  282 | 
  283 |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  284 |   // Edge cases
  285 |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  286 | 
  287 |   test('TC-015 - Editing to a name length of 255 chars succeeds', async ({ page }) => {
  288 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  289 |     const programName = `I.G. LongName Target ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  290 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. long-name precondition');
  291 | 
  292 |     const longName = 'P'.repeat(255);
  293 |     expect(longName).toHaveLength(255);
  294 | 
  295 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  296 |     await edit.fillProgramName(longName);
  297 |     await edit.clickSave();
  298 | 
  299 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  300 |     await expect(programs.exactText(longName)).toHaveCount(1);
  301 |   });
  302 | 
  303 |   test('TC-016 - Editing to special characters / Unicode preserves them exactly', async ({ page }) => {
  304 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  305 |     const programName = `I.G. Unicode Source ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  306 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. unicode precondition');
  307 | 
  308 |     const newName = `Renée's "Accelerated" Updated ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  309 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  310 |     await edit.fillProgramName(newName);
  311 |     await edit.clickSave();
  312 | 
```
